channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'AI Obsession' Is a Big Nothing Burger
item.description: Concerns about partners obsessed with AI will soon seem outdated.

item.title: Scott Pelley's Outburst Exposes Deeper Issues
item.description: News operates as a business, not an academic institution with job security.

item.title: Flaws in the Columbia Riot Ruling on Civil Rights
item.description: A federal judge departs from established law regarding protected class membership.

item.title: Reversing Overprotection Requires Parents and Policymakers
item.description: How can young people become responsible adults if they are constantly shielded?
